dataInputs.label: AI Receiver
dataInputs.description: Optional. Provides audio source for lip sync, mood data for gestures, and character reference. When empty: uses External Audio Source and standalone defaults.

dataInputs.label: Expression Tag
dataInputs.description: Raw expression tag (e.g. happy, sad, excited). Used by Set Expression flow input.

dataInputs.label: Audio Source
dataInputs.description: Audio source for lip sync in standalone mode (without AI Receiver). When Controller is set, its audio source is used instead.

dataInputs.label: Enable Lip Sync
dataInputs.description: Drive mouth blendshapes from TTS audio in real-time

dataInputs.label: Mode
dataInputs.description: ARKit for detailed mouth shapes, VRM Vowels for simpler A/I/U/E/O

dataInputs.label: Enable Micro-Expressions
dataInputs.description: Subtle eye/brow movements that match the character's current mood

dataOutputs.label: Neutral Animation
dataOutputs.description: Neutral idle animation (set as base idle loop)

dataInputs.label: Action Delay
dataInputs.description: Seconds to wait between firing consecutive actions (gives animations time to start)

dataInputs.label: Min Silence (seconds)
dataInputs.description: Minimum seconds of silence before character may comment

dataInputs.label: Max Silence (seconds)
dataInputs.description: Maximum seconds of silence — character will definitely comment by this point

dataOutputs.label: Raw Response Text
dataOutputs.description: Response text with original markup (backticks, asterisks) preserved. Use for TTS.

dataOutputs.label: Expression Tag
dataOutputs.description: Raw AI expression tag (e.g. happy, sad, thinking)

dataOutputs.label: Action Name
dataOutputs.description: Last triggered action name (e.g. wave, dance)

dataOutputs.label: Character Name
dataOutputs.description: Display name of this AI character (for wiring to SendCharacterMessageNode.SenderName)

dataInputs.label: Target AI Receiver
dataInputs.description: The AI character to send the message to

dataInputs.label: Sender Name
dataInputs.description: Name of the character sending this message (shown to the target AI)

dataInputs.label: Max Auto-Replies
dataInputs.description: Loop protection: max back-and-forth exchanges before stopping. 0 = fire once, no chain.

flowOutputs.label: On Limit Reached
flowOutputs.description: Fired when MaxAutoReplies is exceeded — prevents infinite loops

dataInputs.label: AI Receiver
dataInputs.description: The AI Receiver asset to send the message to

dataInputs.label: Message
dataInputs.description: The text message to send to the AI

dataOutputs.label: Was Queued
dataOutputs.description: True if the message was queued because the AI was busy. Use OnAIChatResponseNode to get the actual response.

dataInputs.label: Voice Mode
dataInputs.description: Push-to-Talk: flow-driven start/stop. Voice Activity: auto-detect speech.

dataInputs.label: Silence Threshold
dataInputs.description: Audio level below this is considered silence

dataInputs.label: Silence Timeout
dataInputs.description: Seconds of silence before ending recording

dataInputs.label: Auto-Restart
dataInputs.description: Automatically restart listening after transcription completes

dataInputs.label: Enabled
dataInputs.description: Master toggle. In VAD mode, turning on starts listening automatically.

dataInputs.label: AI Receiver
dataInputs.description: Optional. Provides TTS toggle, speaking state bridge for lip sync, and stop detection.

dataInputs.label: Text
dataInputs.description: Text to speak. Wire from On AI Event's Response Text.

dataInputs.label: Voice
dataInputs.description: ElevenLabs voice ID or local TTS voice name. When connected to an AI Receiver, reads from the asset.

dataInputs.label: Narrator Voice
dataInputs.description: Separate voice for *narration*. Leave empty to use main voice.

dataInputs.label: Allow Inner Thoughts
dataInputs.description: Allow `inner thoughts` to be spoken with echo/reverb effects.

dataInputs.label: Allow Narration
dataInputs.description: Allow *narration text* to be spoken with the narrator voice.

dataInputs.label: Screen
dataInputs.description: The Screen asset to position as a backplate.

dataInputs.label: Camera
dataInputs.description: The camera to lock the backplate behind.

dataInputs.label: Distance
dataInputs.description: How far from the camera to place the backplate.

dataInputs.label: Offset
dataInputs.description: X/Y offset from camera center (in world units).

dataInputs.label: Fill Scale
dataInputs.description: Multiplier for auto-fit size. >1 ensures full coverage.

dataInputs.label: Use Billboard Text
dataInputs.description: Forces text to always face the camera, but alters physics behavior

dataInputs.label: Change Threshold (°)
dataInputs.description: Minimum bone angle change per frame to count as movement.

dataInputs.label: DMX Receiver
dataInputs.description: The Art-Net DMX Receiver asset to subscribe to.

dataOutputs.label: Channels (512)
dataOutputs.description: Raw DMX channel array, 0-255 per slot.

dataInputs.label: Fixture
dataInputs.description: The DMX Fixture asset to read values from.

dataOutputs.label: Pan (-1 to 1)
dataOutputs.description: 0 = straight ahead, -1 = full left, 1 = full right. Moving Head only.

dataOutputs.label: Tilt (-1 to 1)
dataOutputs.description: 0 = straight ahead, -1 = full back, 1 = full forward. Moving Head only.

dataInputs.label: Alpha Channel
dataInputs.description: Set to 0 to use a fixed alpha of 1.0.

dataInputs.label: Light Asset
dataInputs.description: Warudo Directional, Point, or Volumetric Light asset to control.

dataInputs.label: DMX Receiver
dataInputs.description: The Art-Net DMX Receiver asset to subscribe to.

dataInputs.label: Dimmer Channel
dataInputs.description: Absolute DMX channel (1–512) for intensity/dimmer. Set to 0 to disable.

dataInputs.label: Red Channel
dataInputs.description: DMX channel for Red component. Set all color channels to 0 to leave color unchanged.

dataInputs.label: Angle Channel
dataInputs.description: VolumetricLight only — maps 0-255 to 1°-180° beam angle. Set to 0 to disable.

dataInputs.label: Max Intensity
dataInputs.description: Light intensity when DMX dimmer is at 255. Adjust to match your scene's exposure.

dataInputs.label: Channels
dataInputs.description: Connect from an Art-Net Universe node's Channels output.

nodes.title: Throw Prop in a cool way

dataInputs.label: Templated Event Data (JSON)
dataInputs.description: Surround Variables To Template Like {{{{TestInput}}}} For Them To Appear As Inputs

dataInputs.label: Templated Input Settings (JSON)
dataInputs.description: Optional JSON settings. Surround Variables To Template Like {{{{TestInput}}}} For Them To Appear As Inputs

dataInputs.label: Templated Filter Settings (JSON)
dataInputs.description: Optional JSON settings. Surround Variables To Template Like {{{{TestInput}}}} For Them To Appear As Inputs

nodes.title: On Current Scene Transition Duration Changed
On Input Audio Monitor Type Changed
On Input Audio Sync Offset Changed
On Scene Item Enable State Changed
On Scene Item Lock State Changed
On Source Filter Enable State Changed

dataInputs.label: File Path
dataInputs.description: Full path where to save the screenshot

dataInputs.label: Caption Text
dataInputs.description: CEA-608 caption text to send over the stream

nodes.title: Send Raw JSON Request to OBS

dataInputs.label: Request Type
dataInputs.description: The OBS WebSocket request type (e.g. 'GetVersion', 'SetInputSettings', etc.)

dataInputs.label: Raw JSON Data (Templated)
dataInputs.description: Raw JSON request data. Surround Variables To Template Like {{{{TestInput}}}} For Them To Appear As Inputs. Leave empty to send request with no data.

dataInputs.label: Volume
dataInputs.description: Must be a float between 0 and 1

dataInputs.label: Templated Filter Settings (JSON)
dataInputs.description: Surround Variables To Template Like {{{{TestInput}}}} For Them To Appear As Inputs

dataInputs.label: Address
dataInputs.description: The address of this endpoint. If blank this endpoint will receive all messages.

dataInputs.label: Parameters
dataInputs.description: Defines the name, number, and types of arguments this endpoint uses.

dataInputs.label: Host
dataInputs.description: The IP address to send OSC messages to (Default: 127.0.0.1)

dataInputs.label: Port
dataInputs.description: The port to send OSC messages to (Default: 9000)

dataInputs.label: Component Type
dataInputs.description: Select a component type, and please do not change this setting once you've found the target you are looking for.

dataInputs.label: Text Item Index
dataInputs.description: Select an entry that exists on initial load, and before any object hierarchy changes take place.

dataInputs.label: Component Type
dataInputs.description: Select a component type, and please do not change this setting once you've found the target you are looking for.

dataInputs.label: Text Item Index
dataInputs.description: Select an entry that exists on initial load, and before any object hierarchy changes take place.

dataInputs.label: Component Type
dataInputs.description: Select a component type, and please do not change this setting once you've found the target you are looking for.

dataInputs.label: Text Item Index
dataInputs.description: Select an entry that exists on initial load, and before any object hierarchy changes take place.

dataInputs.label: Component Type
dataInputs.description: Select a component type, and please do not change this setting once you've found the target you are looking for.

dataInputs.label: Text Item Index
dataInputs.description: Select an entry that exists on initial load, and before any object hierarchy changes take place.

dataInputs.label: Background Color
dataInputs.description: Select a color for the reward background

dataInputs.label: Check For Duplicates
dataInputs.description: Prevent creating rewards with duplicate titles

dataInputs.label: Confirm Deletion
dataInputs.description: Safety check to prevent accidental deletions

dataInputs.label: Auto Refresh
dataInputs.description: Automatically refresh data every X seconds (0 = manual only)

dataInputs.label: Auto Refresh
dataInputs.description: Automatically refresh data every X seconds (0 = manual only)

dataInputs.label: Username
dataInputs.description: Username to remove moderator status from

dataInputs.label: User ID
dataInputs.description: User ID to remove moderator status from (takes priority over username)

dataInputs.label: New Background Color
dataInputs.description: Select a color for the reward background

dataInputs.label: Templated Message
dataInputs.description: Surround Variables To Template Like {{{{TestInput}}}} For Them To Appear As Inputs

dataInputs.label: Up Vector
dataInputs.description: the relative up vector, in most cases this should just be Y being 1

dataInputs.label: Position
dataInputs.description: the blendshape object's position i.e. the character's head bone position

dataInputs.label: Rotation
dataInputs.description: the blendshape object's rotation i.e. the character's head bone rotation

dataInputs.label: Camera Position
dataInputs.description: this has to be the position of the main camera that you are seeing through

dataInputs.label: Max Radians Delta
dataInputs.description: Maximum angle in radians allowed for the rotation

dataInputs.label: Max Magnitude Delta
dataInputs.description: Maximum allowed change in vector magnitude for this rotation
